backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the jewellery order management backend with CRUD operations for orders, design mappings, karigars, and blob storage for design images and Excel files.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four dashboard-related feature IDs (summary tab metrics, sort order, bold orange design code, remove image icon) to their implementing files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles and recent changes across pages, components, and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading the TypeScript entry point via a module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (Dashboard, IngestOrders, MasterDesigns, KarigarDetail, AgeingStock, etc.) wrapped in QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and SidebarProvider.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Custom: Dashboard tab that filters and displays CO-type Pending orders with a search input supporting order number, design code, and generic name filtering.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Design: Modal dialog for viewing a design's image with zoom and pan (mouse and touch) controls, fetching the image blob via `useGetDesignImage`.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Hallma: Displays orders with Hallmark status grouped by design code, with search/filter controls, bulk status update, delete actions, and a design image modal.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Kariga: Shows pending orders grouped by karigar (artisan) as clickable cards with order count and total weight, navigating to a per-karigar detail route on click.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/OrderT: Renders a paginated, selectable order table with bulk 'mark as ready' actions, delete confirmation, and export options (Excel, PDF, JPEG).
frontend/src/components/dashboard/ReadyT: Displays orders with Ready status grouped by design code, with search/filter controls, bulk status update, and delete actions similar to HallmarkTab.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Summar: Renders summary metric cards (order count, weight, quantity, CO orders) computed from the full orders list based on the currently active dashboard tab.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Suppli: A dialog component that allows users to enter supplied quantities for RB orders, supporting partial supply where remaining units stay as Pending.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TotalO: A dashboard tab that displays all Pending orders grouped by design code, with filtering, selection, bulk actions (mark ready, delete, supply RB), and a design image modal.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Unmapp: An alert section that fetches and displays unmapped design codes (missing generic or karigar name), grouped with counts, and provides navigation to fix them.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppSideba: The application sidebar with navigation links to all major pages and a data reset action that opens a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/layout/DataReset: A confirmation alert dialog that permanently deletes all active (Pending, Ready, Return from Hallmark) orders via a reset mutation.
frontend/src/components/masterdesigns/Ed: A modal dialog for updating a design's karigar assignment, supporting selection from existing karigars or adding a new one, and saving the mapping.
frontend/src/components/tagprinting/Webv: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend actor interactions, including orders, design mappings, master data, and external blobs. Handles cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors for UI elements, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AgeingStock.tsx: Page component that displays pending orders grouped by design code with age-band color coding (green/yellow/red based on days since order date). Supports bulk selection and marking orders as ready via a supplied-quantity dialog.
frontend/src/pages/BarcodeScanning.tsx: Page component supporting both hardware barcode scanner (keyboard event buffering) and camera-based QR scanning to collect order IDs and batch-update their status.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page that renders summary metric cards and a tabbed view (Total Orders, Ready, Hallmark, Customer Orders, Karigars) with loading skeletons, driven by all-orders data.
frontend/src/pages/DesignImages.tsx: A page component for uploading design images to the backend, supporting both folder selection and ZIP file extraction, with batch processing and progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/IngestOrders.tsx: A page component for uploading orders from an Excel file, parsing them with a utility, and saving each order sequentially to the backend canister actor.
frontend/src/pages/KarigarDetail.tsx: A detail page for a specific karigar (artisan) showing their pending orders, with support for exporting orders as PDF/JPEG/Excel and marking orders as ready or supplied.
frontend/src/pages/MasterDesigns.tsx: A page for uploading and managing master design mappings from an Excel file, linking design codes to karigar names, with an editable table and modal for updates.
frontend/src/pages/Reconciliation.tsx: A page for reconciling a master Excel file against existing orders, parsing rows to detect discrepancies and allowing the user to persist matched master data rows to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/TagPrinting.tsx: Page component for tag printing that displays ready orders grouped by design code, supports date range filtering, bulk selection, and triggers a hallmark status update dialog.
frontend/src/pages/UnmappedCodes.tsx: Page component that lists orders with missing design mappings (generic name or karigar), allowing inline editing to update or reassign those mappings.
frontend/src/utils/ageingBadge.tsx: Exports an AgeingBadge React component that displays how many days old an order is with color-coded styling (green ≤14d, amber ≤29d, red 30d+).
frontend/src/utils/excelParser.ts: Utility that dynamically loads SheetJS from CDN and parses an uploaded Excel file into an array of ParsedOrder objects, normalizing headers and resolving order types.
frontend/src/utils/exportUtils.ts: Utility functions for exporting orders to Excel (via SheetJS CDN) and to a PDF with embedded design images fetched from the backend actor, with mobile/iOS detection helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom color tokens (using oklch CSS variables), extended font families, border radii, and includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state version 3 for the Jewellery Order Manager, listing existing implemented features and pending new feature/fix requests related to dashboard tab logic, order sorting, and UI styling.
